_notes: This file contains PATHWAY GUIDANCE for Gemini scholarship search — not actual scholarship data. Gemini uses these as search context to find current, verified scholarship details. Loan data is stored as structured facts since products are relatively stable.

international.chevening_ineligible_note: UAE, Qatar, Bahrain, Kuwait, Oman, Saudi Arabia — Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) nationals are NOT eligible for Chevening. Do not mention Chevening for these nationalities.
search_tips: Search '[university name] international merit scholarship [current year]'
Search '[university name] India scholarship' or '[university name] [nationality] scholarship'
For Chevening-eligible nationalities: mention Chevening (requires ~2 years post-UG work experience, Masters only, annual October deadline)
Commonwealth Scholarship is for developing country nationals — applies through their home country's Ministry of Education nominating body
GREAT Scholarship: partial (min £10,000), British Council managed, ~12 awards per country per year, annual June deadline
international.do_not_mention: UK Student Loan (for UK home students only), EU transition bursaries (EU passport required)

search_tips: UK Student Finance: tuition fee loan up to £9,535/year + maintenance loan (income-assessed) via Student Loans Company — studentfinance.gov.uk
Search '[university name] bursary low income UK home student'
Search '[university name] access to learning fund' or '[university name] hardship fund'
NHS Learning Support Fund for healthcare courses
home_domestic.do_not_mention: International scholarships, Chevening, Commonwealth (these are for non-UK students)

search_tips: Post-Brexit: EU students pay international fees at most UK universities
Search '[university name] EU international merit scholarship'
Some universities still offer EU transition bursaries — search '[university name] EU bursary'
eu_eea.do_not_mention: UK Student Loan (EU students no longer eligible post-Brexit for most programmes)

search_tips: British passport holders qualify as UK home students — access UK Student Finance
May also qualify for university diversity or community scholarships — search '[university name] diversity scholarship'
Most German public universities charge NO tuition fees for all nationalities (only semester contribution ~€350/semester) — mention this prominently
DAAD scholarships: open to all nationalities, no nationality restriction — search 'DAAD scholarship [programme level] [field]'
Deutschlandstipendium: €300/month, offered by individual German universities, apply directly — search '[university name] Deutschlandstipendium'
Search '[university name] international scholarship [current year]'
Baden-Württemberg Stipendium: for exchange students at BW universities with formal partner agreements
international.do_not_mention: BAföG (German nationals and long-term EU residents only)

search_tips: BAföG (Bundesausbildungsförderungsgesetz): government grant/loan, up to €934/month, half grant half interest-free loan — bafög.de
Deutschlandstipendium: €300/month available to German students too
Stipendien-Lotse: German scholarship database — stipendienlotse.de
EU students pay same fees as German students (mostly zero tuition at public universities)
Long-term EU residents may qualify for BAföG — check eligibility
DAAD open to EU students too — search DAAD scholarship database
Australia Awards: fully funded (tuition + living + airfare), return obligation to home country, annual Feb–Apr application — dfat.gov.au
Destination Australia: up to AUD 15,000/year for regional campuses, no return obligation — education.gov.au
Search '[university name] international merit scholarship India [current year]'
University of Sydney: Sydney Scholars India Scholarship Programme — 28 awards including 2 full-ride
University of Melbourne: Graduate Research Scholarship for research degrees (AUD 39,500/year stipend + tuition)
international.do_not_mention: HECS-HELP (Australian citizens/PR only), StudyLink (NZ citizens only)

search_tips: HECS-HELP: government loan covering tuition, repaid through tax once earning above threshold — studyassist.gov.au
VET Student Loans for vocational programmes
Search '[university name] bursary Australian student'
Search '[university name] international merit scholarship [current year]'
UBC Karen McKellin International Leader of Tomorrow (ILOT): CAD 14,000–34,000/year, need-based, undergraduate
University of Toronto Lester B. Pearson Scholarship: fully funded undergraduate, requires school nomination
CGRS-D (replaced Vanier): CAD 40,000/year for 3 years, doctoral only, must be nominated by Canadian institution
Many universities offer entrance scholarships for international students — search '[university name] entrance scholarship international'
international.do_not_mention: Canada Student Loans (Canadian citizens/PR only), provincial loans

search_tips: Canada Student Grant and Loan (NSLSC): federal loans and grants — nslsc.canada.ca
Provincial student loans vary by province — search '[province] student loan'
Search '[university name] bursary Canadian student'

Need-blind universities (Harvard, Yale, Princeton, MIT, Dartmouth, Amherst, Bowdoin): meet 100% of demonstrated financial need for international students — apply for financial aid with admission application
Fulbright Foreign Student Program: fully funded graduate scholarships, apply through USIEF in India — usief.org.in (May–July annual deadline)
Search '[university name] merit scholarship international students [current year]'
CSS Profile required at most need-based aid schools — identify if university uses CSS Profile
Check if university is need-aware for international students (most are) — reduces aid chances
international.do_not_mention: FAFSA/Pell Grant/Federal Direct Loans (US citizens/PR only)

search_tips: FAFSA: Federal Student Aid application — studentaid.gov — unlocks Pell Grants (up to $7,395/year) and Federal Direct Loans
Federal Direct Subsidized/Unsubsidized Loans: low fixed interest rates, income-based repayment options
Search '[university name] scholarship US citizen'
NL Scholarship (formerly Holland Scholarship): €5,000 one-time, first year only, apply through individual Dutch university — studyinnl.org
Orange Tulip Scholarship: DISCONTINUED in 2024 — do not mention
Search '[university name] international merit scholarship [current year]'
Nuffic manages NL Scholarship — check studyinnl.org for participating universities
international.do_not_mention: DUO student loan (Dutch citizens only), Orange Tulip Scholarship (discontinued)

search_tips: EU students pay lower tuition fees in Netherlands (~€2,314/year vs ~€10,000–20,000 for non-EU)
DUO student loan available to EU students working part-time in Netherlands — duo.nl
NL Scholarship still available to EU students
DUO (Dienst Uitvoering Onderwijs): Dutch government student finance — gift component + loan component — duo.nl
Dutch students qualify for OV-chipcard (free public transport while studying)

SI Scholarship for Global Professionals (Swedish Institute): fully funded (full tuition + SEK 12,000/month living + SEK 15,000 travel), only 232 awards globally, highly competitive — si.se (annual February application window, ~2 weeks only)
India is among 34 eligible SI Scholarship countries
Search '[university name] international merit scholarship [current year]'
Many Swedish universities also offer small merit scholarships for non-EU students — search directly on university website
international.do_not_mention: CSN loan (Swedish citizens and EU residents with Swedish connection only)

search_tips: EU students pay NO tuition fees in Sweden (same as Swedish students)
CSN student loan/grant available to EU students if working or connected to Sweden — csn.se
SI Scholarship also available to EU students if applying to eligible programmes
Eiffel Scholarship (Campus France): prestigious, fully funded, Masters and PhD, annual January deadline — campusfrance.org/en/eiffel
French Government Scholarships via French Embassy in applicant's country — contact French Embassy India/Pakistan etc.
Search '[university name] international merit scholarship [current year]'
Most French public universities have low tuition (~€2,770–€3,770/year for non-EU, post-2019 reform)
Campus France portal: campusfrance.org — gateway for international students
international.do_not_mention: Bourse sur critères sociaux (French citizens and long-term EU residents only)

search_tips: EU students pay same low tuition as French students (~€170–€601/year at public universities)
French government social scholarship (Bourse sur critères sociaux) may be available — check CROUS
Government of Ireland International Education Scholarship: 60 awards/year, fully funded, postgraduate — gov.ie/en/service/government-of-ireland-international-education-scholarship
Search '[university name] international merit scholarship [current year]'
Trinity College Dublin: Global Excellence Scholarship — search for current year details
University College Dublin: Global Excellence Awards — search for current year details
international.do_not_mention: SUSI grant (Irish/EU students domiciled in Ireland for 3+ years only)

search_tips: EU students pay same fees as Irish students (EU equality of access)
SUSI grant available to EU students domiciled in Ireland — susi.ie
Search '[university name] EU student support'

MEXT (Ministry of Education, Culture, Sports, Science and Technology) Scholarship: fully funded (tuition + living allowance ¥117,000–¥145,000/month + travel), highly competitive, apply through Japanese Embassy in home country — annual April–June embassy application
JASSO (Japan Student Services Organization) Scholarship: partial, ¥48,000–¥80,000/month — jasso.go.jp
Search '[university name] international scholarship Japan [current year]'
Many Japanese universities offer university-funded scholarships — search '[university name] scholarship for international students'

NUS International Undergraduate Scholarship: fully subsidised tuition (after MOE Tuition Grant) + SGD 6,000/year living + SGD 1,750 computer allowance + accommodation + one-way airfare. 3-year bond to work in Singapore.
NTU Nanyang Scholarship / Nanyang Global Scholarship: similar coverage to NUS, 3-year bond
Note: NTU ASEAN Scholarship is NOT available to Indian/Pakistani/Other non-ASEAN students — do not mention
Research/PhD: NUS Research Scholarship (up to SGD 3,900/month + tuition waiver), NTU Nanyang Research Scholarship, NTU President's Graduate Scholarship
Search '[university name] Singapore international scholarship [nationality] [current year]'
international.bond_note: Most Singapore government-linked scholarships require a 3-year bond to work in Singapore after graduation. Mention this prominently.

search_tips: New Zealand Scholarships (NZAid): fully funded, for developing country students, annual March deadline — mfat.govt.nz/scholarships
Search '[university name] international merit scholarship New Zealand [current year]'
University of Auckland: Global Excellence Scholarship, various amounts
Victoria University of Wellington: Vice-Chancellor's Strategic Scholarship
Most UAE universities (American University of Sharjah, University of Dubai etc.) offer merit scholarships based on grades — search '[university name] UAE merit scholarship [current year]'
UAE government universities like UAE University, Khalifa University offer scholarships primarily for UAE nationals
Search '[university name] international student scholarship UAE'
UAE nationals: check Ministry of Education scholarships for studying abroad — mohesr.gov.ae
ADEK (Abu Dhabi Education and Knowledge) and KHDA (Dubai) offer scholarships for UAE nationals
Search '[destination country] scholarship UAE national'
Korean Government Scholarship Program (KGSP / GKS): fully funded (tuition + living allowance KRW 900,000/month + Korean language training), annual March application — studyinkorea.go.kr
Search '[university name] Korea international scholarship [current year]'
NIIED (National Institute for International Education) manages KGSP — niied.go.kr

international.applies_to_note: For foreign nationals studying IN India
search_tips: ICCR Scholarship (Indian Council for Cultural Relations): fully funded for nationals of 160+ countries, portal opens February annually — a2ascholarships.iccr.gov.in
Search '[university name] India international student scholarship'
Indian students studying in India: Central Sector Scheme, State scholarship portals (NSP — scholarships.gov.in)
Search '[university name] India merit scholarship'
HEC (Higher Education Commission Pakistan) scholarships for studying in Pakistan — hec.gov.pk
Search '[university name] Pakistan international student scholarship'
HEC Pakistan (Higher Education Commission): various scholarship programmes for Pakistani students studying abroad — hec.gov.pk/scholarships
PEEF (Punjab Education Endowment Fund): for Punjab province students
Prime Minister's Overseas Scholarship Programme: merit-based, for PhD/Masters abroad
Prodigy Finance: covers Pakistani students for international study — prodigyfinance.com

India.intro: Indian students studying abroad have several education loan options from Indian banks and NBFCs.

lenders.name: SBI Scholar Loan / SBI Global Ed-Vantage
lenders.max_unsecured: Up to INR 50 lakh (collateral-free, select top universities listed by SBI)
lenders.interest_rate: Scholar Loan: 6.90–7.65% (for students at SBI-listed premium institutions — IITs, IIMs, NITs, top global unis); Standard: ~9.15% onwards
lenders.repayment: Up to 15 years; moratorium = course duration + 6 months
lenders.coverage: 28 countries including USA, UK, Canada, Australia, Germany, France, Singapore
lenders.key_usp: Lowest interest rates in market for Scholar Loan scheme; requires SBI-listed premium institution

lenders.name: HDFC Credila (Credila)
lenders.max_unsecured: INR 70–80 lakh (USA, top universities); INR 50 lakh (other destinations)
lenders.max_secured: No fixed upper cap — depends on collateral value
lenders.interest_rate: 9.75–12% p.a. (floating; varies by profile, university, co-applicant)
lenders.key_usp: India's first specialist education NBFC; high quantum without collateral for top US universities; pre-visa disbursement possible

lenders.name: Avanse Financial Services
lenders.max_unsecured: Up to INR 1.25 Crore (qualifying profiles and institutions)
lenders.key_usp: Pre-admission loans for US STEM Masters; covers up to 75% of living expenses

lenders.name: Auxilo Finserve
lenders.max_unsecured: USA: up to INR 1 Crore; UK/Germany/Ireland/Canada: up to INR 40 lakh; Australia: up to INR 60 lakh
lenders.key_usp: Covers pre-admission costs; partial-interest-only repayment during course

lenders.name: IDFC First Bank Education Loan
lenders.max_unsecured: Up to INR 75 lakh–1 Crore (select top universities)
lenders.repayment: Up to 15 years; moratorium = course duration + 12 months
lenders.key_usp: Explicitly covers GIC (Canada) and Blocked Account (Germany); generous 12-month grace period

lenders.name: Prodigy Finance
lenders.type: International Fintech — No Collateral, No Co-signer
lenders.interest_rate: From 8.33% variable (based on programme, school, career field)
lenders.repayment: Up to 20 years; 6-month grace period post-study
lenders.key_usp: No collateral, no co-signer, no minimum income; based on future earning potential; no Indian asset pledged
lenders.coverage_note: Top universities in USA, UK, continental Europe — check approved school list

lenders.name: MPower Financing
lenders.type: International Fintech — USA and Canada Only
lenders.key_usp: No cosigner, no collateral, no US credit history; refinancing option to release Indian collateral
lenders.coverage_note: USA and Canada only — must attend MPOWER-approved institution

Pakistan.intro: Pakistani students studying abroad can access HEC-managed loans and international options.

lenders.name: HEC Need-Based Scholarship + Loan Programme
lenders.key_usp: Merit-cum-need based; Prime Minister's Overseas Scholarship covers Masters/PhD abroad

lenders.name: Prodigy Finance
lenders.key_usp: Open to Pakistani students; no Pakistani asset required as collateral
lenders.coverage_note: Top universities in USA, UK, Europe — check approved school list

Nigeria.intro: Nigerian students studying abroad can access government scholarships and international loan options.

lenders.name: PTDF Overseas Scholarship (Petroleum Technology Development Fund)
lenders.key_usp: For Nigerian citizens in oil/gas/STEM fields; Masters and PhD abroad

lenders.name: Prodigy Finance
lenders.key_usp: Open to Nigerian students; no Nigerian asset required as collateral

Kenya.intro: Kenyan students studying abroad can access government bursaries and international loan options.

lenders.name: Higher Education Loans Board (HELB)
lenders.key_usp: Kenyan government student loan — primarily for domestic study but check HELB for overseas eligibility

lenders.name: Prodigy Finance
lenders.key_usp: Open to Kenyan students internationally

United Kingdom.intro: UK home students (citizens, settled status, ILR) studying in the UK access government-backed student finance.

lenders.name: UK Student Finance (Student Loans Company — SLC)
lenders.key_usp: Tuition Fee Loan up to £9,535/year + income-assessed Maintenance Loan; repaid only when earning above £25,000/year at 9% of income above threshold; debt written off after 40 years

Germany.intro: German citizens and long-term EU residents in Germany can access BAföG government support.

lenders.name: BAföG (Bundesausbildungsförderungsgesetz)
lenders.key_usp: Up to €934/month; 50% is a grant (never repaid), 50% interest-free loan; repaid only when earning above threshold; income and assets assessed

United States.intro: US citizens and eligible non-citizens studying in the US can access federal student aid via FAFSA.

lenders.name: Federal Direct Loans (via FAFSA)
lenders.key_usp: Subsidized Loans (need-based, government pays interest while in school) and Unsubsidized Loans; low fixed interest rates; income-driven repayment plans available; Public Service Loan Forgiveness for government/nonprofit work

lenders.name: Pell Grant
lenders.key_usp: Up to $7,395/year (2024-25) for low-income undergraduates; does not need to be repaid

UAE.intro: UAE nationals studying abroad may access government scholarship funding; expatriates can use international options.

lenders.name: Ministry of Education UAE Scholarship (Mawhibati Programme)
lenders.key_usp: For UAE nationals studying at approved universities abroad; covers tuition and living expenses

lenders.name: Prodigy Finance
lenders.key_usp: Open to UAE expatriate students internationally; no UAE asset required

Bangladesh.intro: Bangladeshi students studying abroad can access government scholarships and international loan options.

lenders.name: ICB (Investment Corporation of Bangladesh) Education Loan
lenders.key_usp: For Bangladeshi students — check current ICB education loan schemes

lenders.name: Prodigy Finance
lenders.key_usp: Open to Bangladeshi students; no Bangladeshi asset required
